ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Geographical continent of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., World Bank) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic series (e.g., GDP growth) */,
  "series_code" TEXT /* Code representing the economic series */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the country associated with the indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the source of the indicator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator (e.g., %) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Economic Growth) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic indicator */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the indicator */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the indicator within the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES indicator_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_category_mapping_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator for that year */,
  "is_estimate" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the value is an estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license (e.g., Creative Commons) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license terms */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_license_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the economic data entry */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the license governing the data use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_license_mapping_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES data_licenses ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_license_mapping_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used to filter the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team's focus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the team (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
